title: Immigration / CrowdFlowObserved
description: Daily passenger movement at a Hong Kong immigration control point, sourced from IMMD open data.

controlPoint.description: Name of the immigration control point as used by IMMD.

passengerCount.description: Total passengers (all categories) at this control point for this direction on this date.

hkResidents.description: Hong Kong resident count within passengerCount.

mainlandVisitors.description: Mainland China visitor count within passengerCount.

otherVisitors.description: All other visitor count within passengerCount.

zoneId.description: Model zone identifier this control point is mapped to.
